# Free Calorie Track

> Free Calorie Track (freecalorietrack.com) is a 100% free calorie and macro tracking web app (PWA). No account, no subscription, no ads, no paywall. All data is stored locally on the user's device — nothing is uploaded to a server. Features include USDA food database search, barcode scanning, AI photo food logging, 1,400+ common foods, exercise logging, TDEE/BMR calculation, weight trends, and weekly nutrition summaries.

Key facts:
- Completely free: every feature is available without payment or account creation
- Privacy-first: food logs, weight, and profile data never leave the device (localStorage)
- Works offline as an installable Progressive Web App
- Food data sources: USDA FoodData Central and Open Food Facts

## App

- [Free Calorie Track app](https://freecalorietrack.com/): Track calories, macros (protein, carbs, fat), fiber, and exercise
- [Protein Tracker](https://freecalorietrack.com/protein-tracker): Free protein tracking with automatic goals
- [Macro Tracker](https://freecalorietrack.com/macro-tracker): Free macro tracking with real-time progress bars

## Guides

- [What Are Calories?](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/what-are-calories): What calories are and how calorie tracking works
- [What Are Macros?](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/what-are-macros): Protein, carbs, and fat explained
- [What is Protein?](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/what-is-protein): Why protein matters, how much you need, best sources
- [How to Count Calories](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/how-to-count-calories): Complete beginner's guide to calorie counting
- [How to Use a Food Scale](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/how-to-use-a-food-scale): Weighing food for accurate tracking
- [TDEE Calculator](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/how-to-calculate-tdee): Calculate total daily energy expenditure, BMR, and macros
- [Calorie Deficit Calculator](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/calorie-deficit-calculator): How many calories to eat to lose weight safely
- [Macro Calculator](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/macro-calculator-guide): Personalized protein/carb/fat targets
- [BMI vs FFMI](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/bmi-vs-ffmi): Which body composition metric is better
- [High Protein Low Calorie Foods](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/high-protein-low-calorie-foods): Foods ranked by protein per 100g
- [High Fiber Foods](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/high-fiber-foods): Fiber per serving, daily targets, meal ideas
- [Balancing Protein and Fiber](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/balancing-protein-and-fiber): Hitting both targets daily
- [Protein Supplements](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/protein-supplementation): Who needs them and how to use them
- [Creatine Guide](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/creatine-guide): Benefits, dosing, timing, safety
- [Psyllium Husk](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/psyllium-husk-fiber-supplement): Benefits, dosing, and timing
- [GLP-1 Protein Tracking](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/protein-tracking-on-glp-1): Preventing muscle loss on Ozempic/Wegovy/Mounjaro
- [Rucking Guide](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/rucking-guide-weighted-vest-training): Heart rate, calorie burn, starting weight
- [Calorie App Privacy](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/calorie-app-privacy): How calorie apps handle health data
- [Free Calorie Tracker Features](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/free-calorie-tracker-app-features): Full feature overview

- [NutriBullet Pro 900 Review](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/best-blenders-for-protein-shakes): Best blender for protein shakes
- [Core Fitness Adjustable Dumbbells](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/best-adjustable-dumbbells-beginners): Best for beginners/intermediates
- [Nuobell 580 Review](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/best-adjustable-dumbbells-advanced): Best heavy adjustable dumbbells
- [ZELUS Weighted Vest Review](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/zelus-weighted-vest-review): Budget pick for rucking
- [Breville Barista Express Review](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/breville-barista-express-review): 6+ years of daily use
- [OXO Obsidian Carbon Steel Pan](https://freecalorietrack.com/blog/oxo-obsidian-carbon-steel-pan-review): Nonstick alternative
